reviews.comment:
Sólo a veces tienen nafta. Una pobreza el ACA de Posadas. No anda el calibrador de neumaticos.  El kioskito de adentro puras boludeces. Para el viajero nada y eso que está En pleno centro. Atienden mal y lentos los playeros. No pierdan su tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
They only have gas sometimes. The ACA in Posadas is a joke. The tire pressure gauge doesn't work. The little kiosk inside is full of junk. Nothing for travelers, even though it's right downtown. The attendants are slow and rude. Don't waste your time.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención de los playeros, estacione el auto y se me acercó un playero a preguntarme que iba a hacer, a desayunar le contestamos (estábamos con mi pareja e hijo) nos bajamos, y nos piden la llave del auto para "correr" en caso que sea necesario, cuando se supone que si uno se baja a consumir puede utilizar sin problemas el estacionamiento. Luego de ello me olvide el teléfono en el auto, volví a pedir mi llave y se tomaron el atrevimiento de desbloquear ellos mismo mi auto. Después de eso miraban a cada rato a ver qué estábamos haciendo. Una vergüenza tener gente así

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants was a disaster. I parked the car and an attendant approached me to ask what I was going to do. We replied, "Get breakfast" (we were with my partner and child). We got out, and they asked for the car keys, supposedly to "run" if necessary, even though if you get out to buy something, you can use the parking lot without any problem. Then I forgot my phone in the car, asked for my keys again, and they had the audacity to unlock my car themselves. After that, they kept looking over to see what we were doing. It's a disgrace to have staff like that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNzRQajRBRRAB
